question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest number of births in United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A demographer wants the lowest total birth year in the early 2010s.

1.fact: For 2011-2016, the minimum Birth Number occurs in 2013 at 3932181.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest number of births in United States? (Use Birth Number and select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest number of births? (Use Birth Number and select the minimum.) The answer is 2013.
